NEWS \u0026 TRENDING TOPICS \n\nTwin Health Challenge - Nipah \u0026 Shigella Alerts: Kerala is currently facing a dual health crisis. A fresh Nipah virus scare has authorities on high alert, with a patient on a ventilator and contacts under close observation. Simultaneously, a Shigella outbreak in Wayanad has escalated, with confirmed cases rising to 16 among children and the state reporting 34 total cases in June. The Health Department has intensified surveillance and preventive measures across affected districts.\n\nKerala Rain \u0026 Monsoon Alerts: The IMD reports shifting monsoon patterns with heavy rains continuing across the state; orange alerts have been issued for multiple districts.\n\nCMRL Pay-off Case / ED Raids: The Enforcement Directorate continues its probe into the monthly pay-off case, issuing fresh summons to Veena Vijayan.\n\nMedical College Negligence: A duty doctor was suspended after a severe lapse in patient care where an ICU patient's untreated leg wound was found infested with maggots.\n\nEducation / Exams: The Directorate of Higher Secondary Education (DHSE) has announced the schedule for the Kerala 12th SAY (Save A Year) exams, running from June 29 to July 3.\n\nMathrubhumi News (മലയാളം: മാതൃഭൂമി ന്യൂസ്) is a 24-hour Malayalam television news channel and is one of Kerala's most viewed TV channels.
